tools.name: get_account
tools.description: Retrieves a single account by its ID. Returns the account object if found, or a 404 error if not found.

tools.name: get_account_transactions
tools.description: Retrieves all transactions associated with a specific account ID. Returns a list of transactions for that account.

id.description: The account ID whose transactions to retrieve.

tools.name: list_accounts
tools.description: Returns a list of all accounts in the system. No input parameters required.

tools.name: get_card_transactions
tools.description: Retrieves all transactions associated with a specific card ID. Returns a list of transactions for that card.

id.description: The card ID whose transactions to retrieve.

tools.name: list_cards
tools.description: Returns a list of all cards in the system. No input parameters required.

tools.name: dispatch_vendo_action
tools.description: Handles a Vendo stage action dispatched from a sandbox component. Runs the action through the demo policy, executing allowed actions against in-process demo tools; writes require approval per policy.

inputSchema.description: Request body is forwarded directly to handleStageAction; schema is defined by the action handler.

tools.name: chat_vendo
tools.description: Streams a Vendo agent response over HTTP for a given chat message. The agent is keyed by the current set of connected toolkits, so newly connected tools are automatically picked up on the next request.

inputSchema.description: Request body is forwarded directly to handleChat; schema is defined by the chat handler.

tools.name: list_integrations
tools.description: Returns the catalog of available integrations with live connected flags. Optionally polls Composio for a specific toolkit's connection status by passing the 'status' query param along with 'id' and 'account'; marks the toolkit as connected in the demo store when the status is ACTIVE.

status.description: Presence of this parameter triggers a status poll instead of listing integrations.

id.description: The toolkit ID to poll status for (required when 'status' is present).

account.description: The Composio connectedAccountId to poll (required when 'status' is present).

tools.name: manage_integration
tools.description: Manages toolkit integrations: 'authorize' begins/resumes OAuth and returns a redirectUrl and connectedAccountId; 'connect' fast-paths if already authorized or starts OAuth; 'disconnect' removes the toolkit from the demo store without deleting the real Composio account.

id.description: The toolkit/integration ID to act on.

action.description: The action to perform on the integration.

tools.name: reset_vendo
tools.description: Resets the demo to its pristine starting state by re-seeding data and resetting connections. Returns { reset: true } on success.

tools.name: list_goals
tools.description: Returns a list of all financial goals. No input parameters required.

tools.name: get_budgets
tools.description: Returns budget insight data for all categories. No input parameters required.

tools.name: get_cashflow
tools.description: Returns cashflow insight data (income vs. expenses over time). No input parameters required.

tools.name: get_recurring
tools.description: Returns data on recurring transactions and subscriptions. No input parameters required.

tools.name: get_spending_by_category
tools.description: Returns spending broken down by category. No input parameters required.

tools.name: list_notifications
tools.description: Returns a list of all notifications for the user. No input parameters required.

tools.name: create_order
tools.description: Places a late-night delivery order, appending a new transaction to the store.

inputSchema.description: Request body should conform to PlaceOrderInput as defined by the orders server module.

tools.name: list_payees
tools.description: Returns a list of all payees available for payments. No input parameters required.

tools.name: list_scheduled_payments
tools.description: Returns a list of all scheduled payments. No input parameters required.

tools.name: get_profile
tools.description: Returns the current user's profile information. No input parameters required.

tools.name: get_transaction
tools.description: Retrieves a single transaction by its ID. Returns the transaction object if found, or a 404 error if not found.

tools.name: list_transactions
tools.description: Returns a paginated, filterable list of transactions. Supports filtering by search text, category, accountId, status, date range (from/to), amount range (min/max), sorting, and cursor-based pagination via limit and cursor.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return.

cursor.description: Pagination cursor for fetching the next page.
